problem id: ad7edc85
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND SHR(6)) XOR SHL(2)

examples:
  10000010 -> 00001000
  00000111 -> 00011100
  00111001 -> 11100100
  11100111 -> 10011111
  11101000 -> 10100000
  01111010 -> 11101001
  10100010 -> 10001000
  00011011 -> 01101100
  11110001 -> 11000100

query: 01110101
predicted answer: 11010100
